current_html:
§ 182.40 How is the guidance maintained?

The OMB publishes proposed changes to the guidance in the Federal Register for public comment, considers comments with the help of appropriate interagency working groups, and then issues any changes to the guidance in final form.
proposed_html:
§ 182.40
How is this part maintained?

The OMB publishes proposed changes to this part in the Federal Register for public comment, considers comments with the help of appropriate interagency working groups, and then issues any changes to this part in final form.
